title: Data from: The immune system in Antarctic and Sub-Antarctic fish of the genus Harpagifer is affected by the effects of combined microplastics and thermal increase.
author: Nualart, Daniela P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the raw data derived from qPCR gen expression measurements in  Harpagifer antarticus  and  Harpagifer bispinis
